name: Five Stages of Grief
author: Kinky Joe
bootlegger: If a Poppygrower is in play, the Widow chooses a character to poison. When the Poppygrower dies, the Widow sees the grim, and if no player was chosen, the Widow chooses again.
If the Vigormortis attacks itself & a Scarlet Woman becomes the new Vigormortis, one of the original Vigormortis Townsfolk neighbors is poisoned.
If the most recently killed executee is the drunk Village Idiot, the Cannibal's Village Idiot ability is drunk.
If the Knight has their ability, the players they have seen cannot become the Demon.
